0.title: Total balance
0.body: The sum of every account's balance, locked and invested funds included.

1.title: Insights
1.body: Automatic alerts: over-budget categories, unusual spending, budgets that could use a tweak.

2.title: Balance curve
2.body: Day-by-day evolution. The diamonds are your reconciliation checkpoints.

3.title: Spending by category
3.body: Click a donut slice to filter transactions by that category.

4.title: Cash flow
4.body: The Sankey traces where money came from and where it went over the visible period.

0.title: Add an account
0.body: Checking, savings, brokerage… The starting balance is required — every calculation starts from there.

1.title: Locked funds
1.body: For accounts like brokerage or term deposits, tick 'locked' to isolate them from your available balance.

0.title: Drop a file
0.body: OFX, CSV, or PDF. The first time a bank's PDF is imported, an assistant asks you to point at the amount, date, and label zones.

1.title: Multi-select
1.body: Tick several rows to change their category or delete them at once.

2.title: Split a transaction
2.body: Open a transaction to break it into several sub-lines, or edit a category inline.

0.title: Sorting rules
0.body: Rules apply to new imports and can be re-applied retroactively without overwriting your manual categories.

1.title: Sort tab
1.body: Create a rule from a keyword in one click.

0.title: Monthly budget
0.body: Set a target amount per category. Over-budget categories turn red.

0.title: Full backup
0.body: Export accounts, transactions, checkpoints, and splits to one file. Re-import on another install to restore.

0.title: Monthly envelopes
0.body: Set aside a share of your balance per category. The remaining balance is what's left to spend this month.

1.title: Holds
1.body: A hold freezes an amount inside an envelope for the duration of a project, without leaving your checking account.

0.title: All your rules
0.body: Each rule automatically categorizes matching transactions. They apply to upcoming imports.

1.title: Re-apply
1.body: Re-runs the rules over existing history. Categories you set manually are never overwritten.

0.title: Your categories
0.body: Rename, merge, or delete the categories used by your rules and transactions.

1.title: Create a category
1.body: Add a custom category to refine your tracking.

0.title: Detected series
0.body: Athena automatically spots recurring transactions (subscriptions, salaries, rent) in your imports.

1.title: Confirm or dismiss
1.body: Confirm a series to track it, or dismiss it if it isn't actually recurring.

0.title: Upcoming due dates
0.body: Recurring transactions expected in the coming days, grouped by date.

1.title: Switch months
1.body: Navigate from month to month to anticipate upcoming charges.

0.title: Forecast
0.body: The expected trajectory of your balance, factoring in your active recurring series.

1.title: Scope
1.body: Adjust the account, period, and included series to refine the forecast.

0.title: Candidate duplicates
0.body: Pairs of transactions that look alike — same amount, same date, similar labels.

1.title: Merge or dismiss
1.body: Merge to keep a single row, or mark as distinct if these are two genuine transactions.

0.title: Your PDF templates
0.body: Each bank has its own template: where the amount/date/label zones sit on the PDF.

1.title: Add a template
1.body: Import a PDF to create a new template — the assistant asks you to point out the zones just once.
